name: Air / Solo 14mm Frosted Water Tool Adapter
summary: Enhance your bong experience with the Arizer 14mm Water Tool Adapter, expertly crafted from high-quality glass.
description: Enhance your bong experience with the Arizer 14mm Water Tool Adapter, expertly crafted from high-quality glass. Use it to connect your Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser to your preferred bong for a truly enchanting experience, perfect for ice-filled bongs. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
